projectDescription: A web-based RDP client that runs Go compiled to WebAssembly in the browser, bridging WebSocket connections to a remote Windows desktop via a lightweight Go proxy.
keyFeatures: Browser-native RDP client — no plugins or extensions required
Go compiled to WebAssembly for RDP protocol handling in the browser
Lightweight Go proxy bridges WebSocket to raw TCP for the RDP server
Full keyboard and mouse support with RDP scan code mapping
Remote audio streaming via RDPSND decoded with the Web Audio API
H.264 hardware-accelerated video decoding via WebCodecs API
Connection settings persisted via browser cookies
publicApiSurface: rdpConnect(proxyWsURL, host, port, domain, user, password, width, height)
rdpOnH264(destX, destY, w, h, isKey, data) [callback]
